name: Deviled Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into serving size pieces, about 3/4 to 1-inch thick.
2. In a bowl, combine dry mustard, salt, and pepper. Sprinkle over the steak and pound on both sides with a meat mallet.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan and brown the steak quickly on all sides.
4. Pour off any excess drippings from the steak.
5. Drain liquid from mushrooms and add enough water to make 1/2 cup of liquid.
6. Add the liquid, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper mixture to the steak. Cover tightly and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours.
7. During the last 5 minutes of cooking time, add the sliced mushrooms.
8. Remove the steak to a warm serving platter and top with mushrooms.
9. Garnish with carrot curls and parsley or celery leaves.
